channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Musk wields chainsaw onstage at CPAC, touting DOGE cuts
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk joined the Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) stage Thursday wielding a chainsaw, underscoring his efforts to slash the federal budget and workforce through President Trump's so-called Department of Government Efficiency panel.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Climate change is shrinking glaciers faster than ever, with 7 trillion tons lost since 2000
item.description: A new and massive study finds that climate change is melting the world’s mountain glaciers faster than ever.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chaos ahead: emerging technologies will test data privacy, says Britain’s ICO
item.description: Emerging technologies such as connected transport, quantum sensing, healthcare diagnostics, and synthetic AI-driven content are creating huge gaps in data protection and privacy that could quickly outpace the ability of regulators and enterprises to contain them.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Hackers are targeting Signal with new QR code-linked cyberattack
item.description: Russian hackers are targeting military personnel with advanced phishing attacks as they look to access their Signal accounts.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Sad about Dead Boy Detectives being canceled? You’ll be able to see one of the Netflix show’s stars in The Sandman season 2 instead
item.description: If you're sad about the hit Netflix show Dead Boy Detectives being canceled, then there's a special surprise for you in The Sandman season 2.
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: Your iPhone 15 Pro will get a Visual Intelligence upgrade soon – here’s why that’s a big deal
item.description: The iPhone 15 Pro could be getting Apple's Visual Intelligence feature in a future update, and that means there's no reason to upgrade for better AI.
item.dc:creator: john-anthony.disotto@futurenet.com (John-Anthony Disotto), TechRadar

item.title: Bannon: ‘Oligarchs’ will abandon Republicans
item.description: Steve Bannon argued that the “oligarchs” close to President Trump will abandon Republicans the same way they did to Democrats. Bannon was briefly interviewed by CNN’s Donie O’Sullivan on Wednesday, when he continued his case against tech billionaires Elon Musk and Mark Zuckerberg.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Zuckerberg philanthropy ends DEI programs
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's philanthropy has shuttered its diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) programs as well as work on immigration reform as it reduces social advocacy work, the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative (CZI) announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: How to use asyncio: Python’s built-in async library
item.description: Python’s asynchronous programming functionality, or async for short, allows you to write programs that get more work done by not waiting for independent tasks to finish. The asyncio library is a set of tools included with Python for asynchronously processing disk or network I/O.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Experts give up hope for 157 false killer whales stranded on a beach in Australia's Tasmania state
item.description: Marine experts have given up hope of rescuing more than 150 false killer whales that stranded on a remote beach on Australia’s island state of Tasmania.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How drones may be a big help to first responders in the future
item.description: A recent challenge sponsored by NIST tasked drone designers with creating a system to help first responders map indoor environments. The post How drones may be a big help to first responders in the future first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Genesis Unveils Revolutionary GV60 Mountain Intervention Vehicle
item.description: The Genesis GV60 Mountain Intervention Vehicle (MIV) concept showcases the brand's commitment to combining luxury, technology, and functionality in extreme environments.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Key strategies for MLops success in 2025
item.description: Integrating and managing artificial intelligence and machine learning effectively within business operations has become a top priority for businesses looking to stay competitive in an ever evolving landscape.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, PIX 11
